sample: 欢迎使用一站式AI平台开发机服务！
[38;5;46m1. 我们会在您停止开发机时对系统盘的内容（不包括 /tmp 目录）进行持久化保存，重新启动时会进行恢复。[0m
[38;5;46m2. 如需在开发机内部使用 Docker，必须在创建时勾选 “docker容器”。内部容器可使用共享开发机全部显卡资源，并挂载存储：docker run --gpus=all -v /mnt:/mnt <image>[0m
[38;5;46m3. 使用 docker 容器 push 镜像的地址为：cr.infini-ai.com/te-dcsfqwzi4dg6rqsg[0m
[38;5;46m4. 本地存储会随着开发机关机/删除而被销毁，若需持久化存储，请及时将数据保存进系统盘或共享高性能存储。[0m

interpretation.next_action: If a reference USD is structurally valid, evaluate whether a clearly labeled resource-adjusted conversion path can use it; otherwise build a lower-level offline converter from official URDF/MJCF.
interpretation.why_not_complete: The audit can identify candidate preconverted USD assets, but official replay remains blocked unless a valid asset is accepted and wired into the official csv_to_npz/replay pipeline. Reference-code USDs cannot be claimed as official BeyondMimic assets.

kit_validated_reference_usd.why_not_official: This candidate comes from downloaded reference_code, not the official BeyondMimic whole_body_tracking repository or released dataset. It may inform a workaround but cannot be reported as an official BeyondMimic replay asset.

scope: Local read-only audit for preconverted G1 USD candidates that might help unblock the official replay conversion gate. Reference-code assets are explicitly not treated as official BeyondMimic results.
